questions.question: What is Sidus?
questions.answer: Sidus is a global financial platform that lets you send money internationally, manage balances in multiple currencies, and trade between currencies—all from a single, simple app.

questions.question: How does Sidus work?
questions.answer: Sidus connects global payment infrastructure with a modern mobile platform, allowing you to send money, hold different currencies, and convert between them quickly and securely.

questions.question: Can I send money to any country?
questions.answer: Yes. Sidus enables international transfers across a wide range of countries and currencies, allowing you to send money worldwide directly from the app.

questions.question: Which currencies does Sidus support?
questions.answer: Sidus supports multiple global currencies. You can hold balances in different currencies and transfer between them within the app. Check your wallet to view your balance in each currency

questions.question: Can I convert money between currencies inside the app?
questions.answer: Yes. Sidus allows you to trade between currencies instantly, so you can convert your balance whenever you need.

questions.question: Does Sidus include a multi-currency wallet?
questions.answer: Yes. Your Sidus wallet can hold balances in multiple currencies, making it easy to manage international payments and exchanges.

questions.question: How fast are international transfers with Sidus?
questions.answer: Most transfers are processed within seconds, depending on the destination, currency, and payment method used.

questions.question: Is Sidus secure?
questions.answer: Security is a priority. Sidus uses modern encryption, secure authentication, and monitoring systems to protect your account and transactions.

questions.question: Do I need a bank account to use Sidus?
questions.answer: No. Sidus does not require any bank account or other payment methods to fund transfers and manage your balances.

questions.question: Can I receive money through Sidus?
questions.answer: Yes. Sidus allows you to receive funds and keep them in your multi-currency wallet or convert them into another currency.

questions.question: Are there fees for transfers or currency exchanges?
questions.answer: Sidus maintains transparent pricing. Any fees or exchange rates are shown clearly before you confirm a transaction.

questions.question: How do I start using Sidus?
questions.answer: Simply download the app, create an account, verify your identity, and start sending or managing money globally.

questions.question: Can I manage multiple currencies at the same time?
questions.answer: Yes. Your Sidus wallet can hold and manage several currencies simultaneously, making international transactions easier.

questions.question: Can I send money between my own currency balances?
questions.answer: Yes. You can convert between currencies within your wallet whenever you want.

questions.question: Is Sidus suitable for international travelers?
questions.answer: Yes. With multi-currency balances and quick currency conversion, Sidus is designed to make managing money abroad simple.

questions.question: Can businesses use Sidus?
questions.answer: Sidus is designed to support individuals and may expand services for businesses and global payments in the future.

questions.question: What happens if I need help with a transaction?
questions.answer: Sidus provides customer support directly through the app to help resolve any issues with transfers or account management.

questions.question: Why choose Sidus instead of traditional international transfers?
questions.answer: Sidus removes the complexity of traditional banking transfers by providing a faster, simpler, and more transparent way to move money globally.
